Class ServerVirtualView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.ServerVirtualView
All Implemented Interfaces:
BoardObserver, GameObserver, MarketObserver, PlayerObserver
public class ServerVirtualView extends Object implements BoardObserver, GameObserver, MarketObserver, PlayerObserver
Server-side per-client view. Listens to all model observers and forwards each event to the client's ClientRemoteInterface stub (RMI or Socket proxy). Maintains a local snapshot of the game state so it can send full DTOs when needed.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServerVirtualView(ClientRemoteInterface clientStub, String nickname, Runnable disconnectCallback)
    Creates a new server virtual view instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    actionOfferTileChanged(int drawTop, int drawBottom)
    Notifies the client of the change in available actions (number of draws from the top and bottom rows) based on the chosen offer tile.
    void
    eventSolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
    Notifica il client che un evento è stato risolto, indicando l'ID dell'evento e il tipo.
    void
    forceInitialPlayersSync(List<PlayerDTO> allPlayers)
    Sends this client the full list of players in the lobby/game, also updating the local snapshot map.
    void
    gameWinners(List<Player> winners)
    Saves the list of winners in the local snapshot and notifies the client that the game is over.
    ClientRemoteInterface
    getClientStub()
    Returns the RMI stub or Socket proxy used to send notifications to the client.
    String
    getNickname()
    Returns the nickname of the player represented by this view.
    int
    incrementMissedPings()
    Increments the missed-ping counter and returns the new value.
    boolean
    isConnected()
    Returns whether the client is currently connected to the server.
    void
    markDisconnected()
    Marks the client as disconnected and shuts down the notification executor.
    void
    notifyCardAddedToTribe(String playername, Card cardAdded)
    Adds the card to the player's tribe snapshot and notifies the client.
    void
    notifyFoodChanged(String nickname, int newFood)
    Updates a player's food amount in the local snapshot and notifies the client.
    void
    notifyPlayerDisconnected(String disconnectedNickname)
    Notifies the client that a player has disconnected from the game.
    void
    notifyPlayerReconnected(String reconnectedNickname)
    Notifies the client that a previously disconnected player has reconnected.
    void
    notifyPPChanged(String nickname, int newPP)
    Updates a player's prestige-point score in the local snapshot and notifies the client.
    void
    onBoardChanged(List<OfferTile> offerTileList, List<DefaultTile> defaultTileList)
    Updates the board snapshot and sends the new configuration of offer tiles and default tiles to the client.
    void
    onCardRemovedFromBottom(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Removes the card or building at the given position from the bottom market row in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the removal.
    void
    onCardRemovedFromTop(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Removes the card or building at the given position from the top market row in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the removal.
    void
    onEraChanged(ERA currentEra)
    Updates the current era in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the era change.
    void
    onExtraDrawSnapshotReady(List<Card> snapshotCards, List<BuildingCard> snapshotBuildings)
    Saves the end-of-turn market snapshot used for the extra draw.
    void
    onGameChanged(ERA currentEra, List<Player> players, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, Player playerToPlace, Player playerToPlay)
    Updates the era and game-phase snapshots, clears the current-turn fields, and sends the initial game state to the client.
    void
    onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE gamePhase)
    Updates the game phase in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the phase change.
    void
    onMarketChanged(List<Card> topCards, List<Card> bottomCards, List<BuildingCard> topBuildings, List<BuildingCard> bottomBuildings)
    Updates the market snapshot and sends the full new configuration (top and bottom rows of cards and buildings) to the client.
    void
    onPlayerAdded(Player playerAdded)
    Adds the player to the local snapshot map and notifies the client of the new lobby entry.
    void
    onPlayerChanged(String nickname, Totem totem, int food, int prestigePoint, List<Card> tribe, List<BuildingCard> buildingCards)
    Deprecated.
    void
    onPlayerToPlaceChanged(Player newPlayerToPlace)
    Updates the current player for the placing phase and notifies the client.
    void
    onPlayerToPlayChanged(Player newPlayerToPlay)
    Updates the current player for the action phase and notifies the client.
    void
    onTopBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingCard> topBuildingCards)
    Moves the top building row to the bottom, updates the top row with the new buildings, and notifies the client.
    void
    onTopCardRefreshed(List<Card> topCards)
    Moves the top market row to the bottom, updates the top row with the new cards, and notifies the client.
    void
    playerPlacedOnOffertile(Player player, int tilePosition)
    Notifies the client that a player has placed their totem on an offer tile.
    void
    playerToDefaultTile(List<Player> playerOrder)
    Notifies the client of the order in which players are on the default tile at the end of the placing phase.
    void
    pushPlayerAdded(PlayerDTO player)
    Variant of onPlayerAdded(Player) that accepts a PlayerDTO directly.
    void
    receivePing()
    Records reception of a ping from the client, resetting the missed-ping counter.
    void
    reconnect(ClientRemoteInterface newStub, Runnable newDisconnectCallback)
    Swaps in a new client stub and restarts the executor so this view can be reused after the player reconnects.
    void
    requestExtraDraw(String nickname)
    Sends the extra-draw request to the client only if the nickname matches the player of this view.
    void
    resyncClient()
    Sends all stored state snapshots to the reconnecting client so they can resume without missing any game state that was pushed while they were offline.
    void
    sendPong()
    Sends a keepalive pong to the client.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ServerVirtualView

      public ServerVirtualView(ClientRemoteInterface clientStub, String nickname, Runnable disconnectCallback)
      Creates a new server virtual view instance.
      Parameters:
      clientStub - the RMI stub or Socket proxy to push notifications to.
      nickname - the nickname of the player this view represents.
      disconnectCallback - called when an RMI error is detected, to trigger disconnection handling.

  • Method Details

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Returns the nickname of the player represented by this view.
      Returns:
      the player's nickname.

    • getClientStub

      public ClientRemoteInterface getClientStub()
      Returns the RMI stub or Socket proxy used to send notifications to the client.
      Returns:
      the remote interface of the client associated with this view.

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Returns whether the client is currently connected to the server.
      Returns:
      true if the client is connected, false if it has disconnected.

    • receivePing

      public void receivePing()
      Records reception of a ping from the client, resetting the missed-ping counter. Called by the heartbeat watchdog to confirm that the client is still active.

    • incrementMissedPings

      public int incrementMissedPings()
      Increments the missed-ping counter and returns the new value. Called on every watchdog tick; if it exceeds the threshold the player is declared disconnected.
      Returns:
      the updated number of consecutive missed pings.

    • sendPong

      public void sendPong()
      Sends a keepalive pong to the client. Called by the server watchdog every tick so the client's PongWatchdog can detect server death if pongs stop arriving.

    • markDisconnected

      public void markDisconnected()
      Marks the client as disconnected and shuts down the notification executor. After this call, any task submitted via submitTask(ServerVirtualView.ThrowingRunnable) is silently discarded.

    • reconnect

      public void reconnect(ClientRemoteInterface newStub, Runnable newDisconnectCallback)
      Swaps in a new client stub and restarts the executor so this view can be reused after the player reconnects.
      Parameters:
      newStub - the new RMI stub or Socket proxy.
      newDisconnectCallback - disconnect callback bound to the new connection.

    • resyncClient

      public void resyncClient()
      Sends all stored state snapshots to the reconnecting client so they can resume without missing any game state that was pushed while they were offline.

    • notifyPlayerDisconnected

      public void notifyPlayerDisconnected(String disconnectedNickname)
      Notifies the client that a player has disconnected from the game.
      Parameters:
      disconnectedNickname - the nickname of the player who disconnected.

    • notifyPlayerReconnected

      public void notifyPlayerReconnected(String reconnectedNickname)
      Notifies the client that a previously disconnected player has reconnected.
      Parameters:
      reconnectedNickname - the nickname of the player who reconnected.

    • notifyPPChanged

      public void notifyPPChanged(String nickname, int newPP)
      Updates a player's prestige-point score in the local snapshot and notifies the client. Observer callback from PlayerObserver.
      Specified by:
      notifyPPChanged in interface PlayerObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the updated player.
      newPP - the new prestige-point total.

    • notifyFoodChanged

      public void notifyFoodChanged(String nickname, int newFood)
      Updates a player's food amount in the local snapshot and notifies the client. Observer callback from PlayerObserver.
      Specified by:
      notifyFoodChanged in interface PlayerObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the updated player.
      newFood - the new food total.

    • forceInitialPlayersSync

      public void forceInitialPlayersSync(List<PlayerDTO> allPlayers)
      Sends this client the full list of players in the lobby/game, also updating the local snapshot map. Called at game start to ensure all clients have a consistent initial state.
      Parameters:
      allPlayers - the list of all PlayerDTO instances to synchronise on the client.

    • onPlayerChanged

      @Deprecated public void onPlayerChanged(String nickname, Totem totem, int food, int prestigePoint, List<Card> tribe, List<BuildingCard> buildingCards)
      Deprecated.
      Deprecated observer callback: updates the local player snapshot without notifying the client. Superseded by notifyPPChanged(String, int) and notifyFoodChanged(String, int) for granular updates.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerChanged in interface PlayerObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player's nickname.
      totem - the player's totem (colour).
      food - the player's current food amount.
      prestigePoint - the player's current prestige points.
      tribe - the list of tribe cards belonging to the player.
      buildingCards - the list of building cards belonging to the player.

    • onMarketChanged

      public void onMarketChanged(List<Card> topCards, List<Card> bottomCards, List<BuildingCard> topBuildings, List<BuildingCard> bottomBuildings)
      Updates the market snapshot and sends the full new configuration (top and bottom rows of cards and buildings) to the client. Observer callback from MarketObserver.
      Specified by:
      onMarketChanged in interface MarketObserver
      Parameters:
      topCards - the cards in the top market row.
      bottomCards - the cards in the bottom market row.
      topBuildings - the buildings in the top market row.
      bottomBuildings - the buildings in the bottom market row.

    • onTopCardRefreshed

      public void onTopCardRefreshed(List<Card> topCards)
      Moves the top market row to the bottom, updates the top row with the new cards, and notifies the client. Observer callback from MarketObserver.
      Specified by:
      onTopCardRefreshed in interface MarketObserver
      Parameters:
      topCards - the new cards that make up the top market row.

    • onBoardChanged

      public void onBoardChanged(List<OfferTile> offerTileList, List<DefaultTile> defaultTileList)
      Updates the board snapshot and sends the new configuration of offer tiles and default tiles to the client. Observer callback from BoardObserver.
      Specified by:
      onBoardChanged in interface BoardObserver
      Parameters:
      offerTileList - the updated offer tiles with totem positions.
      defaultTileList - the updated default tiles.

    • playerToDefaultTile

      public void playerToDefaultTile(List<Player> playerOrder)
      Notifies the client of the order in which players are on the default tile at the end of the placing phase. Observer callback from BoardObserver.
      Specified by:
      playerToDefaultTile in interface BoardObserver
      Parameters:
      playerOrder - the ordered list of players on the default tile.

    • playerPlacedOnOffertile

      public void playerPlacedOnOffertile(Player player, int tilePosition)
      Notifies the client that a player has placed their totem on an offer tile. Observer callback from BoardObserver.
      Specified by:
      playerPlacedOnOffertile in interface BoardObserver
      Parameters:
      player - the player who performed the placement.
      tilePosition - the index of the chosen offer tile.

    • gameWinners

      public void gameWinners(List<Player> winners)
      Saves the list of winners in the local snapshot and notifies the client that the game is over. Observer callback from GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      gameWinners in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      winners - the list of winning players.

    • onGameChanged

      public void onGameChanged(ERA currentEra, List<Player> players, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, Player playerToPlace, Player playerToPlay)
      Updates the era and game-phase snapshots, clears the current-turn fields, and sends the initial game state to the client. Observer callback from GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      onGameChanged in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      currentEra - the current era of the game.
      players - the list of all players (not used directly in this callback).
      gamePhase - the current game phase.
      playerToPlace - the player who must place their totem (not used directly here).
      playerToPlay - the player who must perform their action (not used directly here).

    • onPlayerAdded

      public void onPlayerAdded(Player playerAdded)
      Adds the player to the local snapshot map and notifies the client of the new lobby entry. Observer callback from GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerAdded in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      playerAdded - the player who joined the game or lobby.

    • pushPlayerAdded

      public void pushPlayerAdded(PlayerDTO player)
      Variant of onPlayerAdded(Player) that accepts a PlayerDTO directly. Used by ServerNetworkHandler to notify clients during the lobby phase, before any Player model objects exist.
      Parameters:
      player - the DTO of the player who just joined the lobby.

    • onEraChanged

      public void onEraChanged(ERA currentEra)
      Updates the current era in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the era change. Observer callback from GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      onEraChanged in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      currentEra - the new game era.

    • onGamePhaseChanged

      public void onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE gamePhase)
      Updates the game phase in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the phase change. Observer callback from GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      onGamePhaseChanged in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      gamePhase - the new game phase.

    • onPlayerToPlaceChanged

      public void onPlayerToPlaceChanged(Player newPlayerToPlace)
      Updates the current player for the placing phase and notifies the client. Clears the action-phase player field since the two phases are mutually exclusive. Observer callback from GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerToPlaceChanged in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      newPlayerToPlace - the player who must place their totem.

    • onPlayerToPlayChanged

      public void onPlayerToPlayChanged(Player newPlayerToPlay)
      Updates the current player for the action phase and notifies the client. Clears the placing-phase player field since the two phases are mutually exclusive. Observer callback from GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerToPlayChanged in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      newPlayerToPlay - the player who must perform their game action.

    • onExtraDrawSnapshotReady

      public void onExtraDrawSnapshotReady(List<Card> snapshotCards, List<BuildingCard> snapshotBuildings)
      Saves the end-of-turn market snapshot used for the extra draw. Does not immediately notify the client: the data is sent in requestExtraDraw(String) only to the player entitled to the additional card. Observer callback from MarketObserver.
      Specified by:
      onExtraDrawSnapshotReady in interface MarketObserver
      Parameters:
      snapshotCards - the cards available in the end-of-turn snapshot.
      snapshotBuildings - the buildings available in the end-of-turn snapshot.

    • onTopBuildingRefreshed

      public void onTopBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingCard> topBuildingCards)
      Moves the top building row to the bottom, updates the top row with the new buildings, and notifies the client. Observer callback from MarketObserver.
      Specified by:
      onTopBuildingRefreshed in interface MarketObserver
      Parameters:
      topBuildingCards - the new buildings that make up the top market row.

    • onCardRemovedFromTop

      public void onCardRemovedFromTop(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
      Removes the card or building at the given position from the top market row in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the removal. Observer callback from MarketObserver.
      Specified by:
      onCardRemovedFromTop in interface MarketObserver
      Parameters:
      position - the index of the card/building removed from the top row.
      cardType - the type of element removed: CARD_TYPE.BUILDING for a building, any other value for a tribe card.

    • onCardRemovedFromBottom

      public void onCardRemovedFromBottom(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
      Removes the card or building at the given position from the bottom market row in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the removal. Observer callback from MarketObserver.
      Specified by:
      onCardRemovedFromBottom in interface MarketObserver
      Parameters:
      position - the index of the card/building removed from the bottom row.
      cardType - the type of element removed: CARD_TYPE.BUILDING for a building, any other value for a tribe card.

    • notifyCardAddedToTribe

      public void notifyCardAddedToTribe(String playername, Card cardAdded)
      Adds the card to the player's tribe snapshot and notifies the client. Observer callback from PlayerObserver.
      Specified by:
      notifyCardAddedToTribe in interface PlayerObserver
      Parameters:
      playername - the nickname of the player who received the card.
      cardAdded - the card added to the player's tribe.

    • requestExtraDraw

      public void requestExtraDraw(String nickname)
      Sends the extra-draw request to the client only if the nickname matches the player of this view. The request includes the previously saved market snapshot. Observer callback from PlayerObserver.
      Specified by:
      requestExtraDraw in interface PlayerObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player entitled to the extra draw.

    • actionOfferTileChanged

      public void actionOfferTileChanged(int drawTop, int drawBottom)
      Notifies the client of the change in available actions (number of draws from the top and bottom rows) based on the chosen offer tile. Observer callback from BoardObserver.
      Specified by:
      actionOfferTileChanged in interface GameObserver
      Parameters:
      drawTop - the number of cards drawable from the top market row.
      drawBottom - the number of cards drawable from the bottom market row.

    • eventSolved

      public void eventSolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
      Notifica il client che un evento è stato risolto, indicando l'ID dell'evento e il tipo. Callback dell'observer GameObserver.
      Specified by:
      eventSolved in interface MarketObserver
      Parameters:
      eventID - l'identificatore univoco dell'evento risolto.
      eventType - il tipo dell'evento risolto.
